active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The active finish-board row is still drmTMB#59 numerical-guard sensitivity. The ordinary q2 correlation-grid, structured q2 boundary, scale-side phylogenetic clamp-active, fixed-effect bivariate sigma1/sigma2 clamp-sensitivity, and Student-t Wald calibration diagnostics are banked as diagnostic evidence only. The Student-t Wald slice has 200 fixed-effect shape fits, minimum convergence 0.91, minimum pdHess 0.89, shape-term Wald coverage 0.87-0.90, and coverage MCSE up to 0.03363034. Larger bivariate scale-route grids, larger guard grids, Student-t profile/bootstrap calibration, additional random-effect and structured correlation guard depth, larger scale-side grids, and broader intervals remain planned.
